def generate_api_endpoints(base_url: str, resources: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    prefix = f"{base_url}/api/v1/"
    return [f"{prefix}{resource}" for resource in resources]


def build_insert_statements(table_name: str, records: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
    statements = []
    for record in records:
        cols = ", ".join(record.keys())
        vals = ", ".join(f"'{v}'" for v in record.values())
        statements.append(f"INSERT INTO {table_name} ({cols}) VALUES ({vals});")
    return statements


def create_log_messages(prefix: str, events: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
    header = f"[{prefix}]"
    messages = []
    for event in events:
        messages.append(f"{header} [{event['level']}] {event['message']} at {event['timestamp']}")
    return messages
